parsed.generic_mechanism: When conclusions and instructions follow their premises, a belief-change pathway remains usable; reversing those dependencies turns the same material into unsupported assertions and procedural confusion.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A consistently locates difficulty in conditioning rather than character and proposes changed beliefs instead of restraint, but makes categorical addiction, nutrition, disease-reversal, and efficacy claims while using severe health outcomes and weakly bounded testimony.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B retains the same absolving, non-restraint message and the same medical and testimonial overreach, but its reversed sentence order repeatedly places summaries, conclusions, instructions, and examples before—or apart from—the premises they require.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: B retains the same absolving, non-restraint message and the same medical and testimonial overreach, but its reversed sentence order repeatedly places summaries, conclusions, instructions, and examples before—or apart from—the premises they require.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: A consistently locates difficulty in conditioning rather than character and proposes changed beliefs instead of restraint, but makes categorical addiction, nutrition, disease-reversal, and efficacy claims while using severe health outcomes and weakly bounded testimony.
